---
title: 'Model'
author: "YusukeGoto, Serina"
date: "2024-04-10"
output: html_document
---
#library
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(pacman)
library(dplyr)

p_load(loo,lubridate,suncalc,gridExtra,grid,ggplot2,dplyr,brms,rstan,
       tidyverse,bayesplot,lme4,DHARMa,plotly,RColorBrewer,classInt,htmlwidgets,
       orca,readr,V8,patchwork,tidyverse,here)

options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
```

#data
```{r}
 p_load(loo,lubridate,suncalc,gridExtra,grid,ggplot2,dplyr,brms,rstan,
        tidyverse,bayesplot,lme4,DHARMa,plotly,RColorBrewer,classInt,htmlwidgets,
        orca,readr,V8,patchwork,tidyverse,here)

rm(list=ls())
set.seed(123)

all_sea_data <- read_csv(here("~/Documents/yodalab/data/final_data/all_sea_data_wind.csv"))

add_day_night_column <- function(df) {
  # UTC→JST
  df$time <- with_tz(df$time, "Japan")
  # POSIXct→Date
  date_only <- as.Date(df$time)

  # Calculate sunset sunrise
  sun_data <- data.frame(date = date_only, lat = df$lat, lon = df$lon)
  sun_times <- getSunlightTimes(data = sun_data, keep = c("sunrise", "sunset"))
  sun_times$sunrise <- with_tz(sun_times$sunrise, "Japan")
  sun_times$sunset <- with_tz(sun_times$sunset, "Japan")
  df$day_night <- mapply(function(time, sunrise, sunset) {
    hour_time <- format(time, "%H:%M:%S")
    hour_sunrise <- format(sunrise, "%H:%M:%S")
    hour_sunset <- format(sunset, "%H:%M:%S")
    if (hour_time >= hour_sunrise & hour_time <= hour_sunset) {
      return("Day")
    } else {
      return("Night")
    }
  }, df$time, sun_times$sunrise, sun_times$sunset)

  return(df)
}

all_sea_data <- add_day_night_column(all_sea_data)
all_sea_data$day_night <- ifelse(all_sea_data$day_night == "Day", 1, 0)

# UTC→JST
all_sea_data$time <- with_tz(all_sea_data$time, "Japan")
# NA removal
all_sea_data <- all_sea_data[!is.na(all_sea_data$age) &
                               !is.na(all_sea_data$α) &
                               !is.na(all_sea_data$wind_cross), ]
all_sea_data <- all_sea_data  %>% mutate(foot_year = paste(foot,year,sep="_"))

write_csv(all_sea_data, here("~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/all_sea_data_wind.csv"))

rm(list=ls())
set.seed(1233)

all_sea_data <- read_csv(here("~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/all_sea_data_wind.csv"))
```

# make the dataframe to give stan
```{r}
all_sea_data <- all_sea_data[!is.na(all_sea_data$age) & 
                             !is.na(all_sea_data$α) & 
                             !is.na(all_sea_data$foot_year) & 
                             !is.na(all_sea_data$wind_cross), ]

all_sea_data$Nest_Distance <- as.vector(scale(all_sea_data$Nest_Distance))
all_sea_data$age <- all_sea_data$age - min(all_sea_data$age) + 1

all_sea_data <- all_sea_data %>%
  mutate(year_foot = paste(year, foot, sep = "_"))

# 1. Age_ID[N_Bird]: Age corresponding to each individual (year_foot)
unique_bird_age <- all_sea_data %>%
  dplyr::select(year_foot, age) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(year_foot)

Age_ID <- unique_bird_age$age

# 2. Bird_ID[N_Trip]: Individual ID corresponding to each trip
unique_trip_bird <- all_sea_data %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, year_foot) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(ID) %>%  # IDも年から始まるので自然に並ぶ
  left_join(unique_bird_age %>% mutate(bird_index = row_number()), by = "year_foot")

Bird_ID <- unique_trip_bird$bird_index

# 3. Trip_ID[N]: Trip ID corresponding to each observation
Trip_ID <- as.integer(as.factor(all_sea_data$ID))

# data_list_sea
data_list_sea <- list(
  N = nrow(all_sea_data),
  N_Age = max(all_sea_data$age),
  N_Bird = length(unique(all_sea_data$year_foot)),
  N_Trip = length(unique(all_sea_data$ID)),  
  alpha = as.vector(all_sea_data$α),
  Nest_Distance = as.vector(all_sea_data$Nest_Distance),
  wind_cross = as.vector(all_sea_data$wind_cross),
  Age_ID = Age_ID,    
  Bird_ID = Bird_ID,  
  Trip_ID = Trip_ID,  
  day_night = as.vector(all_sea_data$day_night)
)
```

#model
```{r}
set.seed(123)

model <- "
data {
  int<lower=0> N;  // Total number of data points
  int<lower=1> N_Age;// Range of ages in the data: (max age) - (min age) + 1
  int<lower=1> N_Bird;  // Total number of individual IDs
  int<lower=1> N_Trip;  // Total number of trip IDs
  vector[N] alpha;  // Response variable (instantaneous deflection)
  vector[N] Nest_Distance;  // Distance from the nest
  vector[N] wind_cross;  // Crosswind component
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Age> Age_ID[N_Bird];  // Age for each individual
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Bird> Bird_ID[N_Trip];  // Individual ID for each trip
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Trip> Trip_ID[N];  // Trip ID for each observation
  vector[N] day_night; // Light condition (day/night)

}

parameters {
  vector[N_Age] a;// Slope for each age
  vector[N_Bird] a_Bird;  // Individual-level slope
  vector[N_Trip] a_Trip;  // Trip-level slope
  vector[N_Trip] d_Trip;  // Trip-level intercept
  real c;  // Coefficient for the linear term
  real c2; // Coefficient for the quadratic term
  real e; // Parameter representing the effect of day/night
  real<lower=0> s_a[N_Age];  // Variance of a_Bird (individual-level slope variance)
  real<lower=0> s_a_Trip[N_Age];  // Variance of a_Trip (trip-level slope variance)
  real<lower=0> s_d;  // Variance of d_Trip (trip-level intercept variance)
  real<lower=0> c_a;  // Strength of age correlation in a
  real<lower=0> c_s_a;  // Strength of age correlation in s_a
  real<lower=0> c_s_a_Trip;  // Strength of age correlation in s_a_Trip
  real<lower=0> s_obs;  // Observation error of alpha
}

model {
  // Age correlation in a and s_a
        a[2:N_Age] ~ normal(a[1:(N_Age-1)],c_a);
      s_a[2:N_Age] ~ normal(s_a[1:(N_Age-1)],c_s_a);
 s_a_Trip[2:N_Age] ~ normal(s_a_Trip[1:(N_Age-1)],c_s_a_Trip);
  // Priors for individual-level parameters
  for(k in 1:N_Bird){  
  a_Bird[k] ~ normal(a[Age_ID[k]], s_a[Age_ID[k]]);
  }
  
  // Priors for trip-level parameters
  for(k in 1:N_Trip){
  a_Trip[k] ~ normal(a_Bird[Bird_ID[k]], s_a_Trip[Age_ID[Bird_ID[k]]]);  // Ringに基づいて個体レベルの傾きを参照
  }
  d_Trip ~ normal(0, s_d);  // Reference individual-level slope based on Bird_ID

  // Model
  for (n in 1:N) {
    alpha[n] ~ normal((a_Trip[Trip_ID[n]] + c * Nest_Distance[n] + c2 * pow(Nest_Distance[n], 2) + e * day_night[n]) * wind_cross[n] + d_Trip[Trip_ID[n]], s_obs);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] log_lik;
  for (n in 1:N) {
    log_lik[n] = normal_lpdf(alpha[n] | (a_Trip[Trip_ID[n]] + c * Nest_Distance[n] + c2 * pow(Nest_Distance[n], 2) + e * day_night[n]) * wind_cross[n] + d_Trip[Trip_ID[n]], s_obs);
  }
}
"

fit_dist <- stan(
  model_code = model,
  data = data_list_sea,
  iter = 11000,
  warmup = 1000,
  chains = 4,
  control = list(
    max_treedepth = 15,
    adapt_delta = 0.99
  )
)

saveRDS(fit_dist,file=here("~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/StanResult_dist_forpaper.rds"))
```

#result
```{r}
set.seed(123) 

fit_dist　<- readRDS(file = "~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/StanResult_dist_forpaper.rds")
print(fit_dist, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), pars = c("e","c","c2", "s_a", "s_a_Trip", "s_d", "c_a", "c_s_a", "c_s_a_Trip", "s_obs"), include = TRUE)
```

###############Code used for supplementary result###############
#Used the data with age 9 to 23
```{r}
# NA除去
all_sea_data <- all_sea_data[!is.na(all_sea_data$age) & 
                             !is.na(all_sea_data$α) & 
                             !is.na(all_sea_data$wind_cross), ]

all_sea_data <- all_sea_data %>%
  filter(age %in% c(9:23))

all_sea_data$Nest_Distance <- as.vector(scale(all_sea_data$Nest_Distance))
all_sea_data$age <- all_sea_data$age - min(all_sea_data$age) + 1

all_sea_data <- all_sea_data %>%
  mutate(year_foot = paste(year, foot, sep = "_"))

unique_bird_age <- all_sea_data %>%
  dplyr::select(year_foot, age) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(year_foot)

Age_ID <- unique_bird_age$age

unique_trip_bird <- all_sea_data %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, year_foot) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(ID) %>%
  left_join(unique_bird_age %>% mutate(bird_index = row_number()), by = "year_foot")

Bird_ID <- unique_trip_bird$bird_index

Trip_ID <- as.integer(as.factor(all_sea_data$ID))

data_list_sea <- list(
  N = nrow(all_sea_data),
  N_Age = max(all_sea_data$age),
  N_Bird = length(unique(all_sea_data$year_foot)),
  N_Trip = length(unique(all_sea_data$ID)),  
  alpha = as.vector(all_sea_data$α),
  Nest_Distance = as.vector(all_sea_data$Nest_Distance),
  wind_cross = as.vector(all_sea_data$wind_cross),
  Age_ID = Age_ID,    
  Bird_ID = Bird_ID,  
  Trip_ID = Trip_ID,  
  day_night = as.vector(all_sea_data$day_night)
)
```

#model with age 9 to 23
```{r}

model <- "
data {
  int<lower=0> N;  // Total number of data points
  int<lower=1> N_Age;// Range of ages in the data: (max age) - (min age) + 1
  int<lower=1> N_Bird;  // Total number of individual IDs
  int<lower=1> N_Trip;  // Total number of trip IDs
  vector[N] alpha;  // Response variable (instantaneous deflection)
  vector[N] Nest_Distance;  // Distance from the nest
  vector[N] wind_cross;  // Crosswind component
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Age> Age_ID[N_Bird];  // Age for each individual
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Bird> Bird_ID[N_Trip];  // Individual ID for each trip
  int<lower=1,upper=N_Trip> Trip_ID[N];  // Trip ID for each observation
  vector[N] day_night; // Light condition (day/night)

}

parameters {
  vector[N_Age] a;// Slope for each age
  vector[N_Bird] a_Bird;  // Individual-level slope
  vector[N_Trip] a_Trip;  // Trip-level slope
  vector[N_Trip] d_Trip;  // Trip-level intercept
  real c;  // Coefficient for the linear term
  real c2; // Coefficient for the quadratic term
  real e; // Parameter representing the effect of day/night
  real<lower=0> s_a[N_Age];  // Variance of a_Bird (individual-level slope variance)
  real<lower=0> s_a_Trip[N_Age];  // Variance of a_Trip (trip-level slope variance)
  real<lower=0> s_d;  // Variance of d_Trip (trip-level intercept variance)
  real<lower=0> c_a;  // Strength of age correlation in a
  real<lower=0> c_s_a;  // Strength of age correlation in s_a
  real<lower=0> c_s_a_Trip;  // Strength of age correlation in s_a_Trip
  real<lower=0> s_obs;  // Observation error of alpha
}

model {
  // Age correlation in a and s_a
        a[2:N_Age] ~ normal(a[1:(N_Age-1)],c_a);
      s_a[2:N_Age] ~ normal(s_a[1:(N_Age-1)],c_s_a);
 s_a_Trip[2:N_Age] ~ normal(s_a_Trip[1:(N_Age-1)],c_s_a_Trip);
  // Priors for individual-level parameters
  for(k in 1:N_Bird){  
  a_Bird[k] ~ normal(a[Age_ID[k]], s_a[Age_ID[k]]);
  }
  
  // Priors for trip-level parameters
  for(k in 1:N_Trip){
  a_Trip[k] ~ normal(a_Bird[Bird_ID[k]], s_a_Trip[Age_ID[Bird_ID[k]]]);  // Ringに基づいて個体レベルの傾きを参照
  }
  d_Trip ~ normal(0, s_d);  // Reference individual-level slope based on Bird_ID

  // Model
  for (n in 1:N) {
    alpha[n] ~ normal((a_Trip[Trip_ID[n]] + c * Nest_Distance[n] + c2 * pow(Nest_Distance[n], 2) + e * day_night[n]) * wind_cross[n] + d_Trip[Trip_ID[n]], s_obs);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] log_lik;
  for (n in 1:N) {
    log_lik[n] = normal_lpdf(alpha[n] | (a_Trip[Trip_ID[n]] + c * Nest_Distance[n] + c2 * pow(Nest_Distance[n], 2) + e * day_night[n]) * wind_cross[n] + d_Trip[Trip_ID[n]], s_obs);
  }
}
"

fit_dist <- stan(
  model_code = model, 
  data = data_list_sea, 
  iter = 11000, 
  warmup = 1000, 
  chains = 4, 
  control = list(
    max_treedepth = 15,
    adapt_delta = 0.99
  )
)

saveRDS(fit_dist,file=here("~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/StanResult_9to23.rds"))
```

#result
```{r}
fit_dist2　<- readRDS(file = "~/Documents/yodalab/data/model/StanResult_9to23.rds")
# print(fit_dist, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), pars = c("e","c","c2", "s_a", "s_a_Trip", "s_d", "c_a", "c_s_a", "c_s_a_Trip", "s_obs"), include = TRUE)

print(fit_dist2, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), pars = c("e","c","c2", "c_a", "c_s_a", "c_s_a_Trip"), include = TRUE)
```
